summary: Iter12 (Trial + £5 Pay-per-Download) backend + frontend verified. Created /app/backend/tests/test_iter12_trial_paywall.py (11 tests). Iter12 results: 10 PASS + 1 XFAIL (sandbox bypass bug, see below). Full regression: 120 PASS + 1 XFAIL across all iter8–12 suites. Frontend: TrialBanner mounts on dashboard for fresh-registered owner with correct copy 'Free trial — 6 days remaining. Downloads are disabled during the trial. Upgrade to unlock.' — yellow background, dismiss button visible, 'Upgrade to unlock' links to /billing. /api/trial/status returns {trial_active:true, days_remaining:6, downloads_allowed:false} as expected. After expiring the trial via direct mongo update, GET /api/payroll/runs/{id}/payslips/{emp}/pdf returns HTTP 402 with '£5.00 per payslip download' message; POST /api/payments/checkout/payslip returns a real Stripe cs_test_... checkout_url with amount=5.0 currency=gbp. DownloadGateService.issue_pass + check_access + consume_pass cycle verified end-to-end (pass grants 200 PDF, second download is 402 again). Scheduler source confirms 4 jobs registered (ukvi/sandbox/retention/trial_reminder).

minor.issue: DownloadGateService.check_access does NOT bypass for is_sandbox=true / demo_mode=true companies. Per iter12 spec, sandbox companies should be exempt from the £5 paywall (intentional for sales tour) — but currently sandbox returns HTTP 402 because the gate only checks trial_active and subscription_active. Fix: in services/trial_service.py DownloadGateService.check_access, add a short-circuit: if company.is_sandbox or company.demo_mode → {allowed: True, reason: 'Sandbox demo'}.

action_items: Fix sandbox bypass in services/trial_service.py DownloadGateService.check_access — sandbox/demo companies must NOT hit £5 paywall (currently they do). Add is_sandbox/demo_mode check at top of check_access, or set downloads_allowed=true for those companies.

(INFO) All other iter12 surfaces pass — trial auto-start, /api/trial/status, 403-during-trial on payslip pdf + checkout + self-service, 402-after-trial paywall, real Stripe checkout_url at £5/gbp, download pass single-use lifecycle, scheduler 4-jobs registration, frontend TrialBanner copy + upgrade link.
critical_code_review_comments: trial_service.py: clean implementation — TRIAL_DURATION_DAYS=7 and PAYSLIP_DOWNLOAD_PRICE=5.00 are module-level constants (server-immutable, good). get_trial_status correctly nullifies trial_active when end<now (defensive against stale flag). issue_pass uses 30-min expiry + single-use (consume_pass uses {used:False} predicate so race-safe). Pass resource_id format is 'PAYRUN:EMPID' end-to-end consistent.
BUG: DownloadGateService.check_access has no sandbox/demo bypass. Sandbox tour will surface a £5 paywall on the very first payslip click — breaks the sales-demo intent stated in the iter12 spec.
routes/trial.py uses an inline get_current_user that re-implements auth (cookie + JWT fallback). Functional but duplicates server.py auth — consider centralizing to avoid drift.

server.py auth/register correctly auto-starts trial on company create (line 553-556). Idempotent because TrialService.start_trial guards on trial_started_at — good. server.py /demo/sandbox path doesn't set trial_active (correct per spec).

payments.py POST /checkout/payslip correctly blocks during trial (403). After trial, calls payment_service.create_payslip_download_checkout which returns Stripe cs_test_... — verified amount=5.0 gbp at the checkout_session.line_items level. _process_successful_payment.payslip_download branch issues a 30-min download pass keyed by company+user+resource_id — verified consumed on first download.

TrialBanner.jsx integration verified visually: yellow bg at >3 days, copy/CTA correct, dismiss + upgrade-link both present. days_remaining transitions to red at <=3 (not retested in this run but logic is in component).

success_rate.backend: 100% on iter12 (10/10 PASS + 1 XFAIL documenting sandbox bypass bug); 120/120 PASS + 1 XFAIL on full regression
success_rate.frontend: 100% on tested surfaces (TrialBanner mount + copy + upgrade link, /api/trial/status integration on dashboard for fresh trial owner)

test_credentials: Fresh trial owner created per-run via /api/auth/register (TEST_iter12_*@example.com / Test123!). Sandbox owner via /api/demo/sandbox. Existing test@example.com / Test123! still available.
seed_data_creation: Per run: 1 fresh trial owner + 1 employee + 1 payrun (from TestPayslipDownloadGate), 1 sandbox owner (auto-seeded 6 employees + payrun). Cleanup not strictly required since sandbox auto-expires and trial test data is prefixed TEST_.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter12 backend + frontend verified except for sandbox-bypass bug in DownloadGateService.check_access (returns 402 for sandbox/demo companies, should return 200/allowed). After fix, re-run TestSandboxDownloadsAllowed::test_sandbox_can_download_payslip — change xfail to plain assert 200. All 10 other iter12 tests + 110 prior regression tests are green. Stripe checkout returns cs_test_ URLs at £5 GBP. Download pass lifecycle (issue→consume) is single-use and 30-min expiry — verified.
rca of the issue: Sandbox 402 bug RCA: services/trial_service.py DownloadGateService.check_access checks (1) trial_active → 403, then (2) existing pass → 200, then (3) falls through to needs_payment=true → 402. Sandbox companies are created with is_sandbox=true + demo_mode=true but trial_active is NOT set, so step 1 is skipped, no pass exists, and they fall to step 3 → 402. Reproduction: POST /api/demo/sandbox → take token → GET /api/payroll/runs/{id}/payslips/{emp}/pdf → 402. Fix: add `if company.get('is_sandbox') or company.get('demo_mode'): return {allowed:True, reason:'Sandbox demo bypass', needs_payment:False}` at the top of check_access (after fetching company doc — note the function currently doesn't fetch the company; it goes via TrialService.get_trial_status which only returns trial+subscription fields, not is_sandbox/demo_mode, so the fix needs an extra db.companies.find_one in check_access OR get_trial_status should include is_sandbox in its return).

mocked_apis.Resend Email: MOCK mode (trial reminders + invite emails logged to backend stdout)
mocked_apis.Stripe Checkout (payslip + subscription): REAL Stripe SDK — pod test key sk_test_emergent. Verified cs_test_... session URLs returned with amount=5.0 currency=gbp.
